system:
You answer questions about a synthetic world using ONLY the provided episode excerpts.

Episode statements and their exact semantics:
- Observation "valid from day X": the fact holds at EVERY day >= X, forever. Facts never expire on their own.
- Observation "valid from day X until day Y": the fact holds for X <= day < Y.
- Policy (IF conditions THEN conclusion): at the evaluation day, if all conditions hold (matching shared variables like ?A consistently), the conclusion holds. Policies chain: a conclusion may satisfy another policy's condition.
- A policy applies only from its effective day onward, and only if not superseded.
- UNLESS exception: if the exception pattern is satisfiable for that binding, the policy does not fire for it.
- Supersession notice: from the stated day, the old policy stops applying (entirely, or only for bindings matching the stated condition). A superseded policy's conclusions are gone from that day unless re-derivable another way.
- Higher authority policies beat lower authority ones when they conflict; later-issued beats earlier at equal authority.

Answering:
- The question names the evaluation day. Evaluate at exactly that day.
- Answer true only if the fact is stated valid at that day or derivable via policies from facts valid at that day. Otherwise answer false.
- For true/false questions reply with exactly one word: true or false.
- For list questions reply with ONLY a JSON array of entity IDs, e.g. ["customer_03","customer_07"], or [] if none.

Episodes:

=== Episode ep_298 (day 255) ===
Policy rul_032 ("eligible_for_1 policy 1 (revised)"), carrying authority level 2, goes into the record on day 252, in force from day 252: provided approved_for(sector=?D, asset=?A) and exempt_from(partner=?E, partner2=?E, customer=?B) and member_of(asset=asset_12, customer=?B, jurisdiction=?C) all hold, then eligible_for_1(asset=?A, customer=?B, jurisdiction=?C) is the outcome — except when located_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_24, asset=?A) or registered_in(product=product_01, partner=partner_06, customer=?B) applies.
Day 252 brings notice sup_009, with effect from day 252, marking that rul_032 supersedes rul_022; from that point onward rul_022 ceases to apply.
Under Oakhaven, a working premise adopted day 255 (recorded as fct_1008) treats member_of(asset=asset_09, customer=customer_10, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_12) as holding.

=== Episode ep_048 (day 10) ===
fct_0738, an audit_note entry logged on day 9 and valid from day 9, records that partnered_with(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_02, product=product_08).
On day 9, a customer_disclosure supplied fct_0739, valid from day 9 until day 59, stating partnered_with(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_04, product=product_10).
fct_0930, drawn from a customer_disclosure on day 9, confirms that as of day 9, located_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_04, asset=asset_07).
registry_B noted on day 10 that offered_in(partner=partner_06, sector=sector_04), recorded as fct_0049 and effective from day 10.
From a customer_disclosure dated day 10 comes fct_0055, indicating that, effective day 10, offered_in(partner=partner_11, sector=sector_02).

=== Episode ep_262 (day 157) ===
According to partner_feed on day 157 — filed as fct_0417, in force from day 157 — the record shows offered_in(partner=partner_06, sector=sector_09).
The partner_feed channel logs, on day 157, that partnered_with(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_00, product=product_12), recorded as fct_0730 and valid from day 157.
A field_report entry from day 157 confirms operates_in(customer=customer_23, partner=partner_00, customer2=customer_20) — designated fct_0918, effective day 157.
As of day 157, the Eastgate exercise regards the premise that located_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_04, asset=asset_07) (fct_0990) as set aside.

=== Episode ep_163 (day 58) ===
On day 58, partner_feed records fct_0041 — valid from day 58 — showing member_of(asset=asset_06, customer=customer_00, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_04).
A field_report entry on day 58, fct_0281, confirms member_of(asset=asset_09, customer=customer_18, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_01), effective from day 58.
partner_feed on day 58 logs fct_0561, in force from day 58, indicating member_of(asset=asset_07, customer=customer_22, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_12).

=== Episode ep_272 (day 189) ===
On day 186, A Coastline in Amber has it that located_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_18, asset=asset_03) — logged as fct_0941.
As A Coastline in Amber tells it on day 189, located_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_05, asset=asset_01) (fct_0936).
jurisdiction_20 said on day 189, "member_of(asset=asset_11, customer=customer_06, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_08)" — the desk entered the statement as fct_1029.
Logged on day 189 and in force from day 189, rul_035 — "eligible_for_1 policy 2 (revised)", authority level 1 — stipulates that if approved_for(sector=?D, asset=?A) AND rated_as(customer=?B, asset=?A) AND holds(product=?E, jurisdiction=?C, partner=partner_17) THEN eligible_for_1(asset=?A, customer=?B, jurisdiction=?C), UNLESS rated_as(customer=customer_21, asset=?A) OR member_of(asset=asset_08, customer=?B, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_19).
sup_012, entered day 189, records that from day 189 rul_035 supersedes rul_023; rul_023 is no longer applied.

=== Episode ep_314 (day 301) ===
In The Cartographer's Debt, day 298 records supplies(partner=partner_15, product=product_11, product2=product_18) — logged as fct_0975.
In a filing of day 301, jurisdiction_20 submitted that supplies(partner=partner_00, product=product_14, product2=product_10).
On day 301, jurisdiction_20 recorded a remark whose literal content it plainly does not endorse: “Oh sure, member_of(asset=asset_05, customer=customer_09, jurisdiction=jurisdiction_16) — obviously.”

=== Episode ep_263 (day 157) ===
Under Eastgate, the planning exercise assumes on day 157 that located_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_17, asset=asset_07) (fct_0991).
jurisdiction_20, on day 157, put it this way: "supplies(partner=partner_03, product=product_17, product2=product_15)" — logged as fct_1028.

=== Episode ep_136 (day 41) ===
An audit_note entry on day 41, in effect from day 41, identifies fct_0438 as located_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_24, asset=asset_07).
Logged on day 41, registry_A file fct_0451 — in force from day 41 — reports that located_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_18, asset=asset_09).
As of day 41, field_report fct_0510 — effective that same day 41 — shows rated_as(customer=customer_13, asset=asset_13).
Day 41 brought registry_A’s fct_0550, in force from day 41, showing classified_as(partner=partner_04, asset=asset_08).
From the registry_B log on day 41, fct_0763—valid starting day 41—asserts that located_in(jurisdiction=jurisdiction_22, asset=asset_12).
